---
title: "Successful Second-Year Project"
description: "MA Defense of Hanzhi Wang"
author: "PADLAB"
date: "04/27/2026"
---

In Spring 2026, the Perception, Action, and Development Lab celebrated doctoral student Hanzhi Wang's successful second-year project defense. On April 27, 2026, Hanzhi presented her project, "The Temporal Structure of Infant Daily Restrained Experiences", in the Developmental Proseminar. 

![Hanzhi Wang presenting](2026-images/Hanzhi-SYP-1.jpeg){width="49%" fig-align="left"}
![](2026-images/Hanzhi-SYP-2.jpeg){width="49%" fig-align="right"}
